ddls:
CREATE TABLE "countries" (
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each country */,
  "country_name" TEXT /* Name of the country */,
  "region" TEXT /* Geographical region the country belongs to */,
  "country_code" TEXT /* ISO 3166-1 alpha-3 country code */,
  "currency" TEXT /* Official currency of the country */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Current population of the country */,
  "area" REAL /* Land area in square kilometers */,
  "capital" TEXT /* Capital city of the country */,
  "government" TEXT /* Type of government */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "economic_indicators" (
  "indicator_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each economic indicator */,
  "indicator_name" TEXT /* Name of the economic indicator (e.g., GDP Growth, Inflation Rate) */,
  "indicator_description" TEXT /* Description of the economic indicator */,
  "unit_of_measure" TEXT /* Unit of measure for the indicator (e.g., percentage, USD) */,
  "frequency" TEXT /* Frequency of data collection (e.g., annual, quarterly) */,
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the data source for the indicator */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("indicator_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "economic_data" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data entry */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the country */,
  "indicator_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the economic indicator */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the data */,
  "value" REAL /* Value of the economic indicator for that year */,
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the data source for the data entry */,
  "data_reliability" TEXT /* Reliability of the data (e.g., high, medium, low) */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date when the data was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_economic_data_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_economic_data_year FOREIGN KEY ("year") REFERENCES years ("year_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_economic_data_indicator_id FOREIGN KEY ("indicator_id") REFERENCES economic_indicators ("indicator_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_economic_data_source_id FOREIGN KEY ("source_id") REFERENCES data_sources ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "years" (
  "year_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each year */,
  "year_value" INTEGER /* The year for which economic data is recorded */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("year_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "regions" (
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each region */,
  "region_name" TEXT /* Name of the region (e.g., Asia, Europe) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, analyst) */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the user */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the user */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Contact phone number of the user */,
  "job_title" TEXT /* Job title of the user */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the user belongs to */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date when the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date when the user account was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the economic data being accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the browser/device used */,
  "duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the access in seconds */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_validation" (
  "validation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each validation record */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the economic data entry being validated */,
  "validation_status" TEXT /* Status of validation (e.g., valid, invalid) */,
  "validation_date" TEXT /* Date of validation */,
  "validator_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who performed the validation */,
  "comments" TEXT /* Comments or notes on the validation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("validation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_validation_validator_id FOREIGN KEY ("validator_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_validation_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES economic_data ("data_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_sources" (
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data source */,
  "source_name" TEXT /* Name of the data source (e.g., World Bank, IMF) */,
  "source_description" TEXT /* Description of the data source */,
  "website" TEXT /* Website URL of the data source */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for the data source */,
  "reliability_score" INTEGER /* Reliability score of the data source (e.g., 1-10) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "indicator_trends" (
  "trend_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each trend record */,
  "indicator_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the economic indicator */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the trend */,
  "trend_value" REAL /* Value representing the trend for that year */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("trend_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_indicator_trends_indicator_id FOREIGN KEY ("indicator_id") REFERENCES economic_indicators ("indicator_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "economic_forecasts" (
  "forecast_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each forecast record */,
  "indicator_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the economic indicator */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year for the forecast */,
  "forecast_value" REAL /* Forecasted value for the economic indicator */,
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the data source for the forecast */,
  "forecast_method" TEXT /* Method used for the forecast (e.g., regression, machine learning) */,
  "confidence_interval" REAL /* Confidence interval for the forecast */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("forecast_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_economic_forecasts_source_id FOREIGN KEY ("source_id") REFERENCES data_sources ("source_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_economic_forecasts_indicator_id FOREIGN KEY ("indicator_id") REFERENCES economic_indicators ("indicator_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "project_collaborations" (
  "collaboration_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each collaboration */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user involved in the collaboration */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user in the project (e.g., lead, contributor) */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Date when the collaboration started */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* Date when the collaboration ended */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("collaboration_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_project_collaborations_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_project_collaborations_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "projects" (
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each project */,
  "project_name" TEXT /* Name of the project */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the project */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the project */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the project */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the project (e.g., active, completed) */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the project */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date when the project was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("project_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_projects_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "audit_logs" (
  "audit_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each audit log */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who performed the action */,
  "action" TEXT /* Type of action performed (e.g., create, update, delete) */,
  "table_name" TEXT /* Name of the table affected */,
  "record_id" INTEGER /* ID of the record affected */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of the action */,
  "details" TEXT /* Detailed information about the action */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("audit_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audit_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
